'''dashuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ppb|ppb]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ppb|ppb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dashuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæshivith|dæshivith]] || [[word:dæshivij|dæshivij]] || [[word:dæshivish|dæshivish]] || [[word:dæshivi|dæshivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dashushuvuth|dashushuvuth]] || [[word:dashushuvuj|dashushuvuj]] || [[word:dashushuvush|dashushuvush]] || [[word:dashushuvu|dashushuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dashuvuth|dashuvuth]] || [[word:dashuvuj|dashuvuj]] || [[word:dashuvush|dashuvush]] || [[word:dashuvu|dashuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dashufvuth|dashufvuth]] || [[word:dashufvuj|dashufvuj]] || [[word:dashufvush|dashufvush]] || [[word:dashufvuf|dashufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dashuvuthu|dashuvuthu]] || [[word:dashuvuju|dashuvuju]] || [[word:dashuvushu|dashuvushu]] || [[word:dashuvuku|dashuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dashuvuth|dashuvuth]] || [[word:dashuvuj|dashuvuj]] || [[word:dashuvush|dashuvush]] || [[word:dashuvu|dashuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dashuvuthul|dashuvuthul]] || [[word:dashuvujul|dashuvujul]] || [[word:dashuvushul|dashuvushul]] || [[word:dashuvukul|dashuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dashuvuthuthu|dashuvuthuthu]] || [[word:dashuvujuju|dashuvujuju]] || [[word:dashuvushushu|dashuvushushu]] || [[word:dashuvuku|dashuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dashuvuthun|dashuvuthun]] || [[word:dashuvujun|dashuvujun]] || [[word:dashuvushun|dashuvushun]] || [[word:dashuvukun|dashuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dashuvuthuoro|dashuvuthuoro]] || [[word:dashuvujuoro|dashuvujuoro]] || [[word:dashuvushuoro|dashuvushuoro]] || [[word:dashuvukuoro|dashuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
